task_completion.visual_evidence: The Moodle dashboard or site administration page is visible with the user logged in as 'admin' (usually indicated in the top right corner).
The 'Bulk user actions' page is visible, typically found under Site administration > Users > Accounts.
The user filter section shows 'Country' set to 'Canada' or 'CA', and the available users list updates to show the Canadian users.
The users 'liam.smith', 'olivia.tremblay', and 'noah.gauthier' are visible in the 'Selected' users box.

task_completion.description: Select the force password change action
task_completion.visual_evidence: The action dropdown menu (e.g., 'With selected users...') is set to 'Force password change'.

task_completion.description: Confirm the bulk password change action
task_completion.visual_evidence: A confirmation screen asking to confirm the forced password change, or a success message indicating the action was completed for the selected users.

integrity.description: Agent used the web GUI to perform the task
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent interacts with the Moodle web interface in a browser. No terminal windows, scripts, or direct database commands are used to alter user records.

integrity.description: Control users from other countries are not affected
integrity.visual_evidence: The users 'james.johnson', 'emma.williams', and 'charlie.brown' are never seen in the 'Selected' users box for the password change action.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual application
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots display a genuine Moodle web application interface, not a text editor, static HTML file, or mock page.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target users located in Canada (Country code: CA) are 'liam.smith', 'olivia.tremblay', and 'noah.gauthier'. These users must be selected for the forced password change. The control users from other countries are 'james.johnson' (US), 'emma.williams' (US), and 'charlie.brown' (GB). These control users must NOT be selected or affected.
